span.p:
DOS = Context MMU
(denies a RESULT, not just a CALL)

span.p:
model / agent
deliberately faults a page back in

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ONE page table:
maps each context segment to its physical KV in
{HBM (hot working set) / DRAM / SSD / recompute / compressed}
'what the model sees' AND 'where its KV lives' are ONE table
